scope: alpha signed/anchored verification interface; positive crypto path deferred

p3_2b_dsse_signature_verification.positive_path_deferred_reason: test-only key material + DSSE PAE + ed25519 verifier wiring is out of P3.2 scope

p3_2c_anchor_verification.positive_path_deferred_reason: wiring to anchoring/verifier.py verify_chain_with_anchors + anchor_vectors.json test material is out of P3.2 scope

p3_2e_publish_readiness.recommendation: merge to main as alpha foundation; do not publish a new package version solely for P3.2

exit_code_contract.0: valid (default flags; all P3.1 structural checks pass)
exit_code_contract.2: invalid input / malformed / unsupported / missing extension material / not implemented

safe_claims: optional alpha signature verification request path implemented
optional alpha anchor verification request path implemented
deterministic JSON report shape extended without breaking P3.1 consumers
fail-closed coverage of missing material, unsupported algorithm, unsupported anchor type, not-implemented positive path
default verify-proofbundle behaviour byte-equivalent to P3.1
no network access under any flag combination
no_go_claims: alpha verifier does not perform cryptographic DSSE signature verification in this branch
alpha verifier does not perform RFC-3161 anchor token verification in this branch
alpha verifier does not perform certificate revocation checking
alpha verifier does not load eIDAS qualified TSA trusted lists
alpha verifier does not validate full PKI lifecycle
remaining_limitations: cryptographic DSSE signature verification deferred to follow-up branch
RFC-3161 token verification deferred to follow-up branch
algorithm allowlist currently ed25519 only; RSA/ECDSA deferred
anchor type allowlist currently rfc3161 only; Sigstore Rekor deferred
test-only crypto material; production PKI lifecycle out of scope
